activities.name: Full comb of Tangletown
activities.description: After a few really poor runs I was aiming to just hit the 10 min pace, but I did a bit better than that. The secret to a happy life: set low expectations, then exceed them.

activities.name: “Mud, mud, glorious mud…
activities.description: Nothing quite like it for cooling the blood” With Mark D in the Mercer Slough.

activities.name: Down Dayton
activities.description: First time since August. Almost smooth… (2 stops)

activities.name: Snake by the lake
activities.description: That python swallowed something big near the play fields

activities.name: Tradition Plateau and the I-90 trail
activities.description: On a crisp winter morning with the whole gang.

activities.name: Lauren’s Loop
activities.description: With herself +Tamara +Herve +Mintu. Very fun visiting all the boats

activities.name: Plans changed mid-run
activities.description: Ran into M & A, retreated to Retreat!

activities.name: Disco loop with Jason after birthday celebrations last night
activities.description: What’s it going to take to get him on Strava?

activities.name: They taste better when you call them Pomme Frites
activities.description: 6 miles with the gang starting and ending at Met Market

activities.name: Lake Loop with Chris!
Kirkland loop against the flow
activities.description: The “12Ks of Christmas” run was going in the opposite direction for much of our course. Fun!

activities.name: Standard Tangle
Combing the tangles with Herve, Ana, and Tamara
Easy 5 listening to Bad-Ass Librarians and delivering rapid Covid tests
activities.description: Not exactly sure how to connect those two activities.

activities.name: Soggy Bottom Boys and Girls
activities.description: Ridges and ravines in the relentless rain. Hoo-ray!

activities.name: Cool and sunny for my last “tangle” of the year
activities.description: And I achieved my goal of going under 9 pace without stopping. I’m happy!

activities.name: Walk with fam around the Hollywood Reservoir
Mt Hollywood lollipop with Grace and Gilad
activities.description: By the time we got to the top we could at least *see* above the smog.

activities.name: Taking the long way to the grocery store
Down to Pan Pacific Park with Grace and Gilad
Thank you LA
activities.description: After 4 rainy days we get a clear one for our last run — in Beverley Hills. With Grace and Gilad

activities.name: Foreshore hike with Pip and Andrew to Clontarf
activities.description: where in 1868 my ancestor William Vial took a bullet for Queen Victoria’s son Alfred during an attempt to assassinate him.

activities.name: First Aussie Open water swim
activities.description: You gotta start somewhere. And there are few prettier places to swim

activities.name: Eat New Years Eve dinner then run the last miles for my yearly goal.
activities.description: Not advised, but sometimes necessary. Thank you Gilad for helping me get to 1100.
